transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling HealthLink Navigator, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, my doctor said she'd send a referral to a cardiologist, but I haven't heard anything and it's been two weeks.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry for the wait. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Daniel Reyes, born March 4th, 1972.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Daniel. I see a referral from Dr. Whitfield to Dr. Osei at Lakeside Cardiology, submitted on the 2nd, but it's still pending insurance authorization.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh, so it's stuck? What do I need to do?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Nothing on your end yet. I can escalate it to our authorization team right now and request expedited review since it's been over ten days.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That would be great, I've been having some chest tightness.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'll flag that as urgent. You should get a call from Lakeside Cardiology within 48 hours to schedule.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, thank you. Should I call them myself too?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You can, but let's give it two business days first. I'll also send you a text confirmation once the authorization clears.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sounds good. I appreciate your help.
